summary: Declares a read-only profile while allowing Write to verify tool-profile enforcement. [CONFIG]

frontmatter.name: readonly-summary-review
frontmatter.description: Use when validating that read-only skills cannot declare write-capable tools.

guiding_principle: A read-only skill cannot include write-capable tools because tool access must match the declared profile. [DOC]
quality_criteria: Allowed tools must equal the declared profile set. [CONFIG]
Read-only behavior cannot include file writing. [DOC]
Tool rationale covers the declared tools. [CODE]
The failure is reproducible without network access. [CODE]
anti_patterns: Granting Write for a review-only workflow.
Using a broad profile to avoid tool reasoning.

edge_cases.case: Write appears in a read-only profile.

edge_cases.expected_behavior: Still reject because the profile does not allow it. [CONFIG]
Keep the failure focused on tool policy. [CODE]

tool_rationale.reason: Incorrectly writes under a read-only profile. [CONFIG]

validation: This fixture must fail when allowed-tools differs from the read-only profile. [CODE]
risks: If accepted, a nominally safe skill could mutate files. [ASSUMPTION]
